response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and geospatial experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust development in routing, navigation, or geospatial data pipeline contexts — critical for this role. Their C++ exposure is limited to academic/legacy NI LabWindows work, and their GIS projects use DLang and Node.js, not the required systems-level languages or routing tile optimization workflows.
strengths: Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and systems
Strong background in data pipelines and real-time systems from past roles
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing or map tiling systems
Primary modern language is TypeScript/Node.js, not systems programming languages
Lacks demonstrated experience with distributed systems for routing data consistency or latency optimization
